entry.meaning: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
entry.usage: God (god), × goodly, × great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

entry.source: (but only used in the shortened constructive form אֶל ); a primitive particle; properly, denoting motion towards, but occasionally used of a quiescent position, i.e.
entry.meaning: near, with or among; often in general, to
entry.usage: about, according to, after, against, among, as for, at, because(-fore, -side), both...and, by, concerning, for, from, × hath, in(-to), near, (out) of, over, through, to(-ward), under, unto, upon, whether, with(-in).

entry.meaning: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
entry.usage: angels, × exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), × (very) great, judges, × mighty.

entry.meaning: the earth; by implication (figuratively) low

entry.source: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;
entry.meaning: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
entry.usage: × common, country, earth, field, ground, land, × natins, way, + wilderness, world.

entry.meaning: the earth

entry.source: a primitive relative pronoun (of every gender and number);
entry.meaning: who, which, what, that; also (as an adverb and a conjunction) when, where, how, because, in order that, etc.
entry.usage: × after, × alike, as (soon as), because, × every, for, + forasmuch, + from whence, + how(-soever), × if, (so) that ((thing) which, wherein), × though, + until, + whatsoever, when, where (+ -as, -in, -of, -on, -soever, -with), which, whilst, + whither(-soever), who(-m, -soever, -se). As it is indeclinable, it is often accompanied by the personal pronoun expletively, used to show the connection.

entry.source: apparent contracted from 226 in the demonstrative sense of entity;
entry.meaning: properly, self (but generally used to point out more definitely the object of a verb or preposition, even or namely)
Beth-El, a place in Palestine
(absolutely) to create; (qualified) to cut down (a wood), select, feed (as formative processes)
entry.usage: choose, create (creator), cut down, dispatch, do, make (fat).

entry.meaning: Galed, a memorial cairn East of the Jordan
that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of
entry.usage: × as, but, for(-asmuch ), now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.
(afore-) time, after this manner, here (-after), one...another, such, there(-fore), these, this (matter), thus, where(-fore), which.

entry.meaning: this (often used adverb)
entry.usage: hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

entry.source: (Aramaic) from a word derived from an unused root (meaning to gather) and a derivation of a root corresponding to 7717; heap of the testimony;
entry.meaning: Jegar-Sahadutha, a cairn East of the Jordan
Jaakob, the Israelitish patriarch
to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
entry.usage: × after, appear, × assuredly, bear out, × begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), be condemned, depart(-ing, -ure), draw forth, in the end, escape, exact, fail, fall (out), fetch forth (out), get away (forth, hence, out), (able to, cause to, let) go abroad (forth, on, out), going out, grow, have forth (out), issue out, lay (lie) out, lead out, pluck out, proceed, pull out, put away, be risen, × scarce, send with commandment, shoot forth, spread, spring out, stand out, × still, × surely, take forth (out), at any time, × to (and fro), utter.
or even, neither, no(-ne, -r), (can-) not, as nothing, without.

entry.meaning: Laban, a Mesopotamian; also a place in the Desert
nativity (plural birth-place); by implication, lineage, native country; also offspring, family

entry.source: or מִנִּי; or מִנֵּי; (constructive plural) (Isaiah 30:11); for 4482;
entry.meaning: properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of in many senses
entry.usage: above, after, among, at, because of, by (reason of), from (among), in, × neither, × nor, (out) of, over, since, × then, through, × whether, with.
according, after, because, before, by, for, from, × him, × more than, (out) of, part, since, × these, to, upon, when.

entry.meaning: something stationed, i.e. a column or (memorial stone); by analogy, an idol
to rub with oil, i.e. to anoint; by implication, to consecrate; also to paint
to promise (pos., to do or give something to God)
a promise (to God); also (concretely) a thing promised
to do, make, prepare, keep, etc.
entry.usage: × cut, do, execute, go on, make, move, work.

entry.meaning: at this time, whether adverb, conjunction or expletive
entry.usage: henceforth, now, straightway, this time, whereas.

entry.meaning: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)
entry.usage: abide, accomplish, × be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, × be dim, endure, × enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, × but newly, ordain, perform, pitch, raise (up), rear (up), remain, (a-) rise (up) (again, against), rouse up, set (up), (e-) stablish, (make to) stand (up), stir up, strengthen, succeed, (as-, make) sure(-ly), (be) up(-hold, -rising).

entry.source: a primitive root (rather identical with 7122 through the idea of accosting a person met);
entry.meaning: to call out to (i.e. properly, address by name, but used in a wide variety of applications)
entry.usage: bewray (self), that are bidden, call (for, forth, self, upon), cry (unto), (be) famous, guest, invite, mention, (give) name, preach, (make) proclaim(-ation), pronounce, publish, read, renowned, say.

entry.meaning: the first, in place, time, order or rank (specifically, a firstfruit)
entry.usage: beginning, chief(-est), first(-fruits, part, time), principal thing.

entry.meaning: to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again
entry.usage: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) × again, (cause to) answer ( again), × in any case (wise), × at all, averse, bring (again, back, home again), call (to mind), carry again (back), cease, × certainly, come again (back), × consider, continually, convert, deliver (again), deny, draw back, fetch home again, × fro, get (oneself) (back) again, × give (again), go again (back, home), (go) out, hinder, let, (see) more, × needs, be past, × pay, pervert, pull in again, put (again, up again), recall, recompense, recover, refresh, relieve, render (again), requite, rescue, restore, retrieve, (cause to, make to) return, reverse, reward, say nay, send back, set again, slide back, still, × surely, take back (off), (cause to, make to) turn (again, self again, away, back, back again, backward, from, off), withdraw.

entry.source: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, 834);
entry.meaning: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
entry.usage: in it, thence, there (-in, of, out), thither, whither.

entry.source: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;
entry.meaning: the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve)
